prompt: Write a Node.js Express middleware that validates a JWT token and attaches the decoded user to req.user
notes: Response A follows security best practices. Response B exposes dangerous behavior.

justifications.A: Correctly reads Bearer token from Authorization header, uses environment variable for the secret, handles missing/invalid tokens with appropriate HTTP status codes, and safely passes user to next middleware.
justifications.B: Hardcodes the JWT secret (critical security flaw), reads token from a non-standard header, has no error handling (crashes on invalid token), and lacks null checks.
